description: Submit a SparkApplication CRD to the Kubernetes Spark Operator (kubeflow/spark-on-k8s-operator) and materialize on terminal state (COMPLETED / FAILED / SUBMISSION_FAILED). Right for organizations wrapping PySpark ETLs behind a config-driven framework and submitting them to k8s. Requires kubectl on PATH.

namespace.label: k8s Namespace
namespace.description: Namespace where the SparkApplication is submitted.

spark_application_body.label: SparkApplication Spec
spark_application_body.description: The `spec:` block of the CRD. Component prepends apiVersion / kind / metadata.

timeout_seconds.label: Timeout (s)
timeout_seconds.description: Deadline for the SparkApplication to reach terminal state.

labels.label: Labels
labels.description: metadata.labels — good for domain / team tagging.

kube_context.label: kubectl Context
kube_context.description: kubectl context name. Omit to use current-context.

delete_on_success.label: Delete on Success
delete_on_success.description: Delete the SparkApplication CRD after COMPLETED (avoids CRD sprawl).
